cis_core_overview.definition: Constitutional Integration and Specification (CIS) Core - The foundational authority layer governing all integrated components in ULX IDE

reference_architecture.description: The structural blueprint that defines how constitutional governance integrates across all merged components

architecture_layers.purpose: Defines the constitutional vocabulary for Authority, Evidence, Verification, Compliance, and Truth
architecture_layers.implementation: constitutional/ schema files and governance core modules

architecture_layers.purpose: Establishes chains of authority from CIS Core to subordinate components
Captures and validates evidence of constitutional compliance

architecture_layers.implementation: conformance validation schemas and test suites
ULX interpreter invariant engine, governance modules

integration_points: Constitutional schemas provide ontology for all components
Governance core provides authority delegation framework

ontology.description: Formal vocabulary and taxonomy for constitutional concepts

authority.definition: The right to govern constitutional artifacts and their evolution
authority.implementation: AUTH_ORDER in ulx.py, governance authority patterns

evidence.definition: Proof of constitutional compliance and operational correctness

verification.definition: Process of validating conformance to constitutional requirements

compliance.definition: Adherence to UCDD standards and constitutional requirements

truth.definition: The constitutional boundary of what can be claimed as verified
truth.boundaries: defined by evidence package and verification status

integrated_ontology_mapping.nova_crk2: Maps to lawful authority level with CRK-2 governance
integrated_ontology_mapping.skillzmcgee_crk1: Maps to sovereign authority level with CRK-1 governance
integrated_ontology_mapping.ai_factory: Maps to reactive authority level for build governance
integrated_ontology_mapping.ulx_runtime: Maps to pure authority level for constitutional interpretation

knowledge_graph.description: Graph representation of constitutional relationships and dependencies
graph_queries: Find all components governed by a specific constitutional schema
Trace authority chains from CIS Core to any component
Identify evidence gaps for constitutional compliance
Map verification dependencies across integrated components

gks_governance_kernel_system.description: The runtime enforcement engine for constitutional governance

invariant_engine.integration: Applied to ULX programs and integrated components

governance_violation_handler.function: Handles constitutional violations with rollback and audit

audit_trail.function: Records all governance events for replay and inspection
audit_trail.integration: Central audit for all integrated components

anchor_system.function: Provides rollback points for governance violations
